caption: The video depicts two individuals, both wearing face masks, engaged in a conversation at a desk in what appears to be a medical or educational setting. The person on the left, with long hair tied back and wearing a white mask, is standing and seems to be explaining something, gesturing with their hands. The person on the right, dressed in blue scrubs and wearing a black mask, is seated and listening attentively, occasionally nodding and responding. The background includes shelves with various items and a computer monitor, suggesting a professional environment. The interaction appears focused and collaborative, possibly related to patient care or a simulation exercise, as indicated by the "Sim Week" logo in the corner of the screen.
